LanguageData.RR_SkycastSynthetic.description: Skycast is incredibly systematic in telling her stories, she will often tell brutally realistic and random tales that flow with the hardship you face, but give you just enough room to advance. Stories of steady progress, high drama, or crushing defeat - Skycast loves telling a good story.
LanguageData.RR_SkycastSynthetic.label: Skycast Synthetic
